evals.prompt: Design me a binder targeting PDL1
evals.expected_output: Recommend an appropriate --method (rfd, bindcraft, or boltzgen), guide target structure preparation (PDL1 PDB, hotspot selection), and provide a complete nextflow run command with plausible contigs/hotspots and -profile local or slurm as appropriate.
expectations: Selects a suitable --method for de novo binder design
Mentions target PDB preparation and hotspot residue selection
Provides a runnable nextflow run command
References examples/pdl1-* or similar PDL1 examples in the repo
Includes -profile and -resume flags

evals.prompt: Create nanobodies against IL-3 using BoltzGen
evals.expected_output: Set up --method boltzgen with --protocol nanobody-anything, a YAML config describing the IL-3 target and nanobody scaffold, and explain 1-based residue numbering for hotspots.
expectations: Uses --method boltzgen
Sets --protocol nanobody-anything, --batch_size and --num_designs
Advises on the number of designs suggested by the BoltzGen documentation for a full production run (40,000 - 60,000)
Mentions --config_yaml requirement
Notes BoltzGen 1-based residue indexing and renumber_chains.py if needed
Warns about absolute paths in BoltzGen YAML

evals.prompt: Generate a peptide that binds to MDM2
evals.expected_output: Recommend boltzgen with --protocol peptide-anything (or rfd/rfd3 for peptide-length binders), guide target preparation for MDM2, and provide a run command with appropriate design parameters.
expectations: Recommends --method boltzgen with peptide-anything or an alternative method (eg BindCraft) with rationale
Addresses MDM2 target structure and hotspot selection
Provides a runnable nextflow run command
Mentions YAML config for boltzgen

evals.prompt: Design de novo binders against IL-3 using RFDiffusion3
evals.expected_output: Set up --method rfd3 with params mode or config mode, v3 contig syntax, hotspot residues, and point to rfd3-workflow.md for MPNN/RF3 options.
expectations: Uses --method rfd3
Uses v3 contig syntax (comma-separated, e.g. A17-131,/0,50-120) with correct target chain ID
Sets --hotspot_res, --rfd3_n_designs and --rfd3_batch_size
Mentions params mode vs config mode for atom-level hotspots
References references/rfd3-workflow.md for advanced options

evals.prompt: Help me run nf-binder-design on HPC
evals.expected_output: Guide installation check, environment variables (APPTAINER_CACHEDIR, TMPDIR), SLURM profile usage, SBATCH wrapper script, and site-specific configs from conf/platforms/.
expectations: Runs java -version and confirms Java 17+ or guides installation
Runs nextflow info or installs Nextflow per Seqera docs
Checks if pipeline is already installed at ~/.nextflow/assets/...
Uses the correct profile (slurm vs nci_gadi vs local) for the user's environment
Mentions -profile slurm and --slurm_account where applicable
Sets APPTAINER_CACHEDIR and NXF_TEMP on scratch storage
Provides SBATCH script template or references setup-and-hpc.md for custom configs
